zh.lifeSummary: 當Johannes aka John Browne於大約1502年出生在英國素福爾可斯可哈爾時，他的父親William Browne33歲，母親Mary Margaret Mallet36歲。他和Annes Brome至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於從1546年4月11日到1546年5月10日在英國英格蘭素瑞霍利。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Johannes aka John Browne was born about 1502, in Spexhall, Suffolk, England, his father, William Browne, was 33 and his mother, Mary Margaret Mallet, was 36. He had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Annes Brome. He died from 11 April 1546 to 10 May 1546, in Horley, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johannes aka John Browne est né environ 1502, à Spexhall, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William Browne, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mary Margaret Mallet, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Annes Brome. Il est décédé du 11 avril 1546 au 10 mai 1546, à Horley, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Johannes aka John Browne(이)가 대략 1502년 영국 수폴크 스p스홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Browne(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Margaret Mallet(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Annes Brome(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1546년 4월 11일부터 1546년 5월 10일까지 영국 잉글랜드 수리 호를리에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johannes aka John Browne родился около 1502 г. в местности спексхолл, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William Browne было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Margaret Mallet, 36.
